div.p: % of people prescribed PrEP among those identified as being at elevated risk for HIV acquisition

tr.td:
ID: HIV.IND.3.IP
Description:
Initial Population
Logic Definition: Initial Population

ID: HIV.IND.3.DEN
Description:
a) Programme/service provider level: number of individuals who received a negative HIV test during the reporting period and identified as being at elevated risk for HIV acquisition (includes people requesting/receiving any HIV prevention intervention, people from key populations, people with known risk factors or assessed as being at risk of HIV acquisition) | | b) Population level: population-level estimate of the number of people who would benefit from PrEP, for example as derived from a PrEP need estimator tool
Logic Definition: Denominator

ID: HIV.IND.3.NUM
Description:
Number of unique individuals prescribed or dispensed any form of PrEP at least once during the reporting period. Individuals prescribed different products or regimens at different times during the reporting period should be counted only once.
Logic Definition: Numerator

Description: FHIR model information
Resource: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIR-ModelInfo|4.0.1
Canonical URL: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIR-ModelInfo|4.0.1

Description: Library HIE
Resource: HIVIndicatorElements
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVIndicatorElements

Description: Library FHIRHelpers
Resource: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIRHelpers|4.0.1
Canonical URL: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIRHelpers|4.0.1

Description: Library Concepts
Resource: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConcepts|0.0.2
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConcepts|0.0.2

Description: Library Elements
Resource: HIVElements
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVElements

Resource: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConceptsCustom|0.0.1

Description: Library WC
Resource: WHOCommon
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/WHOCommon

Description: Code system HIVConcepts
Resource: WHO SMART HIV Concepts CodeSystem
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Description: Code system ObservationCategoryCodes
Resource: Observation Category Codes
Canonical URL: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category

Display: Transgender female
Code: HIV.A.DE22
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Code: HIV.A.DE21
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Code: HIV.B.DE49
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Code: social-history
System: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category

System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Code: HIV.B.DE82
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Facility-level testing
Code: HIV.B.DE17
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Currently on PrEP
Code: HIV.C.DE10
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: PrEP for HIV prevention
Code: HIV.C.DE76
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: TDF + FTC
Code: HIV.C.DE18
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Other TDF-based regimen
Code: HIV.C.DE21
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Dapivirine vaginal ring DVR
Code: HIV.C.DE22
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: First-time user
Code: HIV.C.DE25
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Continuing user
Code: HIV.C.DE26
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Restarting following a period of not taking PrEP
Code: HIV.C.DE27
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Daily oral PrEP
Code: HIV.C.DE12
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Event-driven PrEP 2+1+1
Code: HIV.C.DE13
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Other PrEP dosing type
Code: HIV.C.DE14
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Name: Measurement Period
Use: In
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: Period

Name: Initial Population
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: boolean

Name: Stratification
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: string

Type: Patient
Profile(s):
Patient
Must Support Elements: use

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: code, status, category, effective, issued, code.coding
Code Filter(s):
Path: code
Code:

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: encounter, status, code, issued

Type: Encounter
Profile(s):
Encounter
Must Support Elements: location

Type: MedicationStatement
Profile(s):
MedicationStatement
Must Support Elements: status, reasonCode, medication, effective, statusReason, dosage

pre.code: /* * As defined by Member State */ define "Initial Population": true

define "By Age Stratifier 3": case when "Age In Years" >= 15 and "Age In Years"<= 19 then '15-19' when "Age In Years" <= 24 then '20-24' when "Age In Years" <= 49 then '25–49' when "Age In Years" >= 50 then '50+' else null end

define "Key population member type Observation": Elements."Key population member type Observation" O where O.effective.toInterval() before end of "Measurement Period" or O.issued before end of "Measurement Period"
define setting: case when Community_testing then Concepts."Community-level testing" when Facility_testing then Concepts."Facility-level testing" else null end

// Provider type concepts are not found in DD
define "Stratification": HIE."By Administrative Gender Stratifier".code + ':' + HIE."By Age Stratifier 3" + ':' + HIE."By Geographic Region Stratifier" + Combine(HIE.patientGroups, ':') + ':' + HIE."setting".code + Combine(HIE.prep_product, ':') + Combine(HIE.prep_experience, ':') + Combine(HIE.prep_dosing, ':')
define function ToString(value AdministrativeGender): value.value
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value AddressUse): value.value
define function ToString(value ObservationStatus): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define function ToDateTime(value instant): value.value
define function ToString(value MedicationStatementStatus): value.value

tr.th: Generated using version 0.4.6 of the sample-content-ig Liquid templates

display.value: Restarting following a period of not taking PrEP

valueString.value: Initial Population
/* * As defined by Member State */ define "Initial Population": true
By Administrative Gender Stratifier
Age In Years
By Age Stratifier 3

define "By Age Stratifier 3": case when "Age In Years" >= 15 and "Age In Years"<= 19 then '15-19' when "Age In Years" <= 24 then '20-24' when "Age In Years" <= 49 then '25–49' when "Age In Years" >= 50 then '50+' else null end
By Geographic Region Stratifier
Key population member type Observation
Key population member type Observation

define "Key population member type Observation": Elements."Key population member type Observation" O where O.effective.toInterval() before end of "Measurement Period" or O.issued before end of "Measurement Period"
define setting: case when Community_testing then Concepts."Community-level testing" when Facility_testing then Concepts."Facility-level testing" else null end
Currently on PrEP
TDF + FTC C.DE18
TDF + FTC C.DE18
TDF C.DE19
TDF C.DE19
TDF + 3TC C.DE20
TDF + 3TC C.DE20
Other TDF-based regimen
Other TDF-based regimen
Dapivirine vaginal ring DVR C.DE22
Dapivirine vaginal ring DVR C.DE22
CAB-LA C.DE23
CAB-LA C.DE23
First-time user C.DE25
First-time user C.DE25
Continuing user
Continuing user
Restarting following a period of not taking PrEP
Restarting following a period of not taking PrEP
Daily oral PrEP
Daily oral PrEP
Event-driven PrEP 2+1+1
Event-driven PrEP 2+1+1
Other PrEP dosing type
Other PrEP dosing type

// Provider type concepts are not found in DD
define "Stratification": HIE."By Administrative Gender Stratifier".code + ':' + HIE."By Age Stratifier 3" + ':' + HIE."By Geographic Region Stratifier" + Combine(HIE.patientGroups, ':') + ':' + HIE."setting".code + Combine(HIE.prep_product, ':') + Combine(HIE.prep_experience, ':') + Combine(HIE.prep_dosing, ':')
define function ToString(value AdministrativeGender): value.value
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value AddressUse): value.value
define function ToString(value ObservationStatus): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define function ToDateTime(value instant): value.value
define function ToString(value MedicationStatementStatus): value.value

description.value: % of people prescribed PrEP among those identified as being at elevated risk for HIV acquisition

a) Programme/service provider level: number of individuals who received a negative HIV test during the reporting period and identified as being at elevated risk for HIV acquisition (includes people requesting/receiving any HIV prevention intervention, people from key populations, people with known risk factors or assessed as being at risk of HIV acquisition) | | b) Population level: population-level estimate of the number of people who would benefit from PrEP, for example as derived from a PrEP need estimator tool

Number of unique individuals prescribed or dispensed any form of PrEP at least once during the reporting period. Individuals prescribed different products or regimens at different times during the reporting period should be counted only once.
